title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Preserve !prof metadata when folding select.
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/binop-select.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/binop-select.ll
index b14e4dbd0702e..2393a3be3b5f9 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/binop-select.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/binop-select.ll
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py UTC_ARGS: --check-globals smart
 ; RUN: opt < %s -passes=instcombine -S | FileCheck %s
 
 declare void @use(i32)
@@ -959,13 +959,13 @@ define i8 @xorSelectxorSame(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
 define i8 @addSelectaddNoCommonBits1(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @addSelectaddNoCommonBits1(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V0:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ARG1:%.*]], -1
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], i8 5, i8 1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], i8 5, i8 1, !prof [[PROF0:![0-9]+]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V3:%.*]] = add i8 [[TMP1]], [[ARG0:%.*]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[V3]]
 ;
   %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
   %v1 = add i8 %arg0, 4
-  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
+  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0, !prof !0
   %v3 = add i8 %v2, 1
   ret i8 %v3
 }
@@ -1044,17 +1044,19 @@ define i8 @addSelectaddSomeCommon2(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
 define i8 @addSelectaddSame(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @addSelectaddSame(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V0:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ARG1:%.*]], -1
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], i8 84, i8 42
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], i8 84, i8 42, !prof [[PROF0]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V3:%.*]] = add i8 [[TMP1]], [[ARG0:%.*]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[V3]]
 ;
   %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
   %v1 = add i8 %arg0, 42
-  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
+  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0, !prof !0
   %v3 = add i8 %v2, 42
   ret i8 %v3
 }
 
+!0 = !{!"branch_weights", i32 10, i32 90}
+
 ; sub tests
 define i8 @subSelectsubNoCommonBitsConstOnLeft1(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @subSelectsubNoCommonBitsConstOnLeft1(
@@ -1347,3 +1349,6 @@ define <4 x i8> @orSelectOrVectors(<4 x i8> %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
   ret <4 x i8> %v3
 }
 
+;.
+; CHECK: [[PROF0]] = !{!"branch_weights", i32 10, i32 90}
+;.
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/branch.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/branch.ll
index 1d5ff72eef9ce..09bba16e9e6c7 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/branch.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/branch.ll
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py UTC_ARGS: --check-globals smart
 ; RUN: opt -passes=instcombine -S < %s | FileCheck %s
 
 declare void @use(i1)
@@ -121,8 +121,8 @@ define i32 @logical_and_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_and_not(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_X:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]]
-; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[TMP0]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0:![0-9]+]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[TMP0]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0]]
 ; CHECK:       t:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
 ; CHECK:       f:
@@ -130,8 +130,8 @@ define i32 @logical_and_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ;
 entry:
   %noty = xor i1 %y, true
-  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %noty, i1 false
-  br i1 %and, label %t, label %f
+  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %noty, i1 false, !prof !0
+  br i1 %and, label %t, label %f, !prof !0
 
 t:
   ret i32 42
@@ -140,22 +140,24 @@ f:
   ret i32 3
 }
 
+!0 = !{!"branch_weights", i32 10, i32 20}
+
 ; if (x && y || !x) ret 3; ret 42 --> if (!x || y) ret 3; ret 42
 
 define i32 @logical_and_or(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_and_or(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_X:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]]
-; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
 ; CHECK:       t:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
 ; CHECK:       f:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 3
 ;
 entry:
-  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 true
-  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t
+  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 true, !prof !0
+  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0
 
 t:
   ret i32 42
@@ -170,8 +172,8 @@ define i32 @logical_or_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_or_not(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOTX:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOTX]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]]
-; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOTX]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1]]
 ; CHECK:       t:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
 ; CHECK:       f:
@@ -179,8 +181,8 @@ define i32 @logical_or_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ;
 entry:
   %notx = xor i1 %x, true
-  %and = select i1 %notx, i1 true, i1 %y
-  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t
+  %and = select i1 %notx, i1 true, i1 %y, !prof !0
+  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0
 
 t:
   ret i32 42
@@ -338,3 +340,9 @@ if.else:
   %zext = zext i1 %cmp to i32
   ret i32 %zext
 }
+
+
+;.
+; CHECK: [[PROF0]] = !{!"branch_weights", i32 20, i32 10}
+; CHECK: [[PROF1]] = !{!"branch_weights", i32 10, i32 20}
+;.

tests.test_body:
define i8 @addSelectaddNoCommonBits1(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @addSelectaddNoCommonBits1(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V0:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ARG1:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], i8 5, i8 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V3:%.*]] = add i8 [[TMP1]], [[ARG0:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[V3]]
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = add i8 %arg0, 4
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = add i8 %v2, 1
  ret i8 %v3
}
tests.source_program:
define i8 @addSelectaddNoCommonBits1(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = add i8 %arg0, 4
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = add i8 %v2, 1
  ret i8 %v3
}

tests.test_body:
define i8 @addSelectaddSame(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @addSelectaddSame(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V0:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ARG1:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], i8 84, i8 42
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V3:%.*]] = add i8 [[TMP1]], [[ARG0:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[V3]]
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = add i8 %arg0, 42
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = add i8 %v2, 42
  ret i8 %v3
}
tests.source_program:
define i8 @addSelectaddSame(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = add i8 %arg0, 42
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = add i8 %v2, 42
  ret i8 %v3
}

tests.test_body:
define i8 @addSelectaddSomeCommon2(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @addSelectaddSomeCommon2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V0:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ARG1:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], i8 16, i8 11
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V3:%.*]] = add i8 [[TMP1]], [[ARG0:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[V3]]
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = add i8 %arg0, 5
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = add i8 %v2, 11
  ret i8 %v3
}
tests.source_program:
define i8 @addSelectaddSomeCommon2(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = add i8 %arg0, 5
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = add i8 %v2, 11
  ret i8 %v3
}

tests.test_body:
define <4 x i8> @orSelectOrVectors(<4 x i8> %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @orSelectOrVectors(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V0:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ARG1:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], <4 x i8> <i8 5, i8 6, i8 27, i8 21>, <4 x i8> <i8 1, i8 4, i8 17, i8 5>
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V3:%.*]] = or <4 x i8> [[TMP1]], [[ARG0:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <4 x i8> [[V3]]
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = or <4 x i8> %arg0, <i8 4, i8 2, i8 11, i8 21>
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, <4 x i8> %v1, <4 x i8> %arg0
  %v3 = or <4 x i8> %v2, <i8 1, i8 4, i8 17, i8 5>
  ret <4 x i8> %v3
}
tests.source_program:
define <4 x i8> @orSelectOrVectors(<4 x i8> %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = or <4 x i8> %arg0, <i8 4, i8 2, i8 11, i8 21>
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, <4 x i8> %v1, <4 x i8> %arg0
  %v3 = or <4 x i8> %v2, <i8 1, i8 4, i8 17, i8 5>
  ret <4 x i8> %v3
}

tests.test_body:
define i8 @subSelectsubNoCommonBitsConstOnLeft1(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @subSelectsubNoCommonBitsConstOnLeft1(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V0:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ARG1:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V1:%.*]] = sub i8 4, [[ARG0:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V2:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], i8 [[V1]], i8 [[ARG0]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V3:%.*]] = add i8 [[V2]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[V3]]
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = sub i8 4, %arg0
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = sub i8 %v2, 1
  ret i8 %v3
}
tests.source_program:
define i8 @subSelectsubNoCommonBitsConstOnLeft1(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = sub i8 4, %arg0
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = sub i8 %v2, 1
  ret i8 %v3
}

tests.test_body:
define i8 @xorSelectxorSame(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @xorSelectxorSame(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V0:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ARG1:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V1:%.*]] = xor i8 [[ARG0:%.*]], 42
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V3:%.*]] = select i1 [[V0]], i8 [[ARG0]], i8 [[V1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[V3]]
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = xor i8 %arg0, 42
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = xor i8 %v2, 42
  ret i8 %v3
}
tests.source_program:
define i8 @xorSelectxorSame(i8 %arg0, i8 %arg1) {
  %v0 = icmp eq i8 %arg1, -1
  %v1 = xor i8 %arg0, 42
  %v2 = select i1 %v0, i8 %v1, i8 %arg0
  %v3 = xor i8 %v2, 42
  ret i8 %v3
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @logical_and_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_and_not(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_X:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[TMP0]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0]]
; CHECK:       t:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
; CHECK:       f:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 3
entry:
  %noty = xor i1 %y, true
  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %noty, i1 false, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %t, label %f, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @logical_and_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
entry:
  %noty = xor i1 %y, true
  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %noty, i1 false, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %t, label %f, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @logical_and_or(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_and_or(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_X:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK:       t:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
; CHECK:       f:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 3
entry:
  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 true, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @logical_and_or(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
entry:
  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 true, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @logical_or_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_or_not(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOTX:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOTX]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1]]
; CHECK:       t:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
; CHECK:       f:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 3
entry:
  %notx = xor i1 %x, true
  %and = select i1 %notx, i1 true, i1 %y, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @logical_or_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
entry:
  %notx = xor i1 %x, true
  %and = select i1 %notx, i1 true, i1 %y, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}
